results.rendered_html:
śrotas n. [śru-asun tuṭ ca]
1 The ear.
2 The trunk of an elephant.
3 An organ of sense.
4
(pb) The stream or current (for srotas q. v.).
Comp.
— raṃdhraṃ an aperture of the trunk, a nostril;  Me. 42.  (also written srotoraṃdhra).
